summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Title Search & Abstracting iteration 3 features. All 16 backend tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass. Key fixes verified: PDF content gaps fixed (Tax Year 2025, Assessment Year 2025, Tax Status Paid, Total Value $391,818, Chain Book/Page 16178-01020, Plat in Misc Docs B/P 00065-00138, Names Search includes BLUE LAKE ESTATES UNIT 02), no double-type bug, and Documents tab shows meaningful names.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified working. Key findings: 1) PDF content now includes Tax Year 2025, Assessment Year 2025, Tax Status Paid, Total Value $391,818, 2) Chain Book/Page 16178-01020 is populated, 3) Plat in Misc Docs shows B/P 00065-00138, 4) Names Search includes BLUE LAKE ESTATES UNIT 02, 5) No double-type bug (e.g., 'Warranty Deed Deed'), 6) Documents tab shows meaningful names like 'Special Warranty Deed — to PITTS DERRICK R — ($259,000)' and 'Plat Book — ($100)', 7) Download PDF button works correctly.

document_names_verified: Special Warranty Deed — to PITTS DERRICK R — ($259,000)

bug_fix_applied.issue: DocType literal did not include 'plat' type, causing 500 error on documents endpoint
